primary_route: FAQ admin/compat routes -> answerFaqFromKb -> getDisclaimer; paid assistant path -> generatePaidAssistantReply -> getDisclaimer
notes: Counts as preset user-facing text because exact strings are hardcoded and appended or returned directly.

primary_route: opsConfigRepo default LLM policy -> getDisclaimer(policy override) -> FAQ/paid paths if policy loaded
notes: Policy seed copy is source-connected but end-user delivery remains unconfirmed.

primary_route: FAQ admin/compat route -> answerFaqFromKb blocked result -> fallbackActions -> Admin UI label render
notes: Preset CTA labels are fixed even though suggested FAQ titles are dynamic.

primary_route: LINE webhook -> handleAssistantMessage -> replyWithFreeRetrieval -> generateFreeRetrievalReply -> buildEmptyReply
notes: Exact title slot is dynamic; surrounding scaffold is preset.

primary_route: LINE webhook -> handleAssistantMessage -> replyWithFreeRetrieval -> generateFreeRetrievalReply -> buildRankedReply
notes: Exact article ids, titles, and scores are dynamic; scaffold and labels are preset.

primary_route: searchFaqFromKb helper -> candidates consumed by callers; replyText itself not observed on current user-facing path
notes: Observed helper text exists, but current runtime-connected callers use candidate arrays or newer free retrieval formatter instead of this replyText.

primary_route: assistant packet -> styleRouter/selectResponseStyle -> responseStyles renderer -> humanized reply text
notes: This record groups eight preset style families; exact line bodies are fixed but action content inside them can be dynamic.

primary_route: LINE webhook free path -> contextual domain resume -> resolveFreeContextualFollowup -> replyText
notes: Preset short followup answers are domain-specific and can add a question line when needsQuestion is true.

primary_route: LINE webhook paid path -> routeConversation(casual) -> generatePaidCasualReply
notes: This family intentionally includes greeting, smalltalk, intro, generic prompt, followup action lines, and domain direct answers.

primary_route: LINE webhook paid path -> routeConversation/domain_orchestrator -> generatePaidDomainConciergeReply
notes: not_observed

primary_route: paid assistant answer generation -> formatPaidReplyConversation -> webhook send
notes: Model-generated semantic content is dynamic; this record inventories only the fixed conversation scaffolding.

primary_route: paid assistant answer generation -> formatPaidReply (legacy) -> webhook send if conversation-format flag disabled
notes: Current runtime truth filter classified this family as dead_or_test_only for final user-visible output on main path.

primary_route: paid assistant/orchestrator output -> sanitizePaidMainReply -> finalizer -> webhook send
notes: This family is a structural guard and strips legacy terms before final delivery.

primary_route: reply generated -> answer readiness decision applied -> clarify/refuse/hedged text returned
notes: not_observed

primary_route: paid orchestrator -> evaluateRequiredCoreFactsGate -> clarify candidate or enforced clarify text
notes: not_observed

primary_route: paid orchestrator -> verifyCandidate -> clarify candidate / hedged candidate -> finalizeCandidate
notes: not_observed

primary_route: orchestrator selected candidate -> sanitizePaidMainReply -> finalizeCandidate -> applyAnswerReadinessDecision -> final text
notes: not_observed

primary_route: runtime knowledge assembly -> buildRuntimeKnowledgeCandidates -> candidate consumed by reply builder
notes: This family is indirect: candidate text is built here, then consumed downstream by reply pipelines.

primary_route: POST /webhook/line -> handleLineWebhook -> handleAssistantMessage / direct command branches -> fixed ack or fallback text
notes: This family mixes assistant fallback, clarify/refuse, synthetic ack, consent ack, and direct command acknowledgements that are all routed from webhookLine.

primary_route: assistant/journey/notification payload -> line renderer -> fallback text/template/flex defaults
notes: Route tracer observed assistant sends are mostly text today; flex/template defaults remain conditionally reachable through renderer policy and non-assistant flows.

primary_route: LINE webhook ensure user -> sendWelcomeMessage -> pushFn
notes: Pure fixed notification text; no dynamic blocks except delivery state.

primary_route: sendNotification -> buildLineNotificationMessage -> text/template buttons LINE payload
notes: Notification titles, bodies, and CTA labels are usually dynamic; this family inventories only preset renderer defaults and join patterns.

primary_route: LINE webhook -> direct command branch -> region message helper -> replyFn
notes: All four strings are hardcoded, runtime-connected direct command replies.

primary_route: LINE webhook -> city pack feedback direct command -> helper -> replyFn
notes: Two fixed feedback texts only.

primary_route: LINE webhook -> membership direct command -> redacLineMessages helper -> replyFn
notes: Each reply is a summary + nextAction pair wrapped by withNextAction().

primary_route: LINE command TODO詳細 / continuation -> taskDetailSectionReply -> replyFn
notes: Current runtime includes admin-facing task-detail wording in user-facing flow.

primary_route: LINE command/postback -> handleJourneyLineCommand -> renderTaskFlexMessage -> flex reply
notes: All button labels and section labels are fixed preset user-facing text.

primary_route: LINE message/postback -> parser -> handleJourneyLineCommand / handleJourneyPostback -> fixed replyText or flex payload
notes: This family groups many hardcoded command replies because they share the same parser-driven command surface.

primary_route: internal journey reminder job -> buildReminderMessage -> pushFn
notes: Reminder copy includes internal trigger framing in user-facing delivery path.

primary_route: task blocked reason code -> blockedReasonJa label map -> downstream task/journey surface if rendered
notes: User-facing label map was observed, but direct runtime surface was not fully traced; therefore conditionally_reachable.

primary_route: emergency usecase -> messageTemplates -> downstream bulletin/notification send path
notes: Adjacent runtime family included because it is preset user-facing text, but it is outside the main FAQ/assistant route.

primary_route: ops next action execution -> default escalation notification payload
notes: Default English ops escalation notification can mix operator framing into outward notification path.
